title: coleataenia abscissa
side_effects: Coleataenia abscissa can have side effects if used improperly, such as nausea, headaches, and dizziness due to its high concentration of toxic compounds. Overconsumption of the plant can lead to liver damage, gastrointestinal issues, and even respiratory problems in severe cases. Additionally, improper use of Coleataenia abscissa may cause allergic reactions, such as skin irritation, itching, and swelling. It is essential to consult with a medical professional or a qualified herbalist before using Coleataenia abscissa for medicinal purposes.
